entry.title: How cheap, outsourced labour in Africa is shaping AI English
entry.quote: Workers in Africa have been exploited first by being paid a pittance to help make chatbots, then by having their own words become AI-ese

entry.title: A curious phenomenon called 'Etak'
entry.quote: Today, I’d like to tell you about the Etak Navigator, a truly revolutionary product and the world’s first practical vehicle navigation system.

entry.title: Oh the Humanity
entry.quote: Why You Can't Build Apple with Venture Capital; Humane tried to cosplay as Apple, adopting its "My way or the highway" attitude without any of Apple's leverage that makes it work.

entry.title: Navigating Data for Social Change: Lessons from the Abolitionists’ Database Project
entry.quote: Drawing from the abolitionists’ database project, we identify five key lessons about data collection, analysis, and advocacy. These insights are crucial for understanding the transformative power of data in historical and contemporary contexts.

entry.title: Meta’s battle with ChatGPT begins now
entry.quote: Meta’s AI assistant is being put everywhere across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook. Meanwhile, the company’s next major AI model, Llama 3, has arrived.
